##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Royal Ontario Museum
##DESCRIPTION=Parallel aggregates of lead-gray bladed crystals associated with quartz, pyrite, magnetite, and tetrahedrite. Co-type sample
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R110046
